case_title: EDWARD K. OSHANA VS. GREGORY BRONSTEIN et al

docket_entries.description: PERSONAL INJURY/PROPERTY DAMAGE - NON-VEHICLE RELATED, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF OSHANA, EDWARD K. AS TO DEFENDANT BRONSTEIN, GREGORY DOES 1 TO 50 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR NOV-06-2013 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  AUG-06-2013 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         OCT-22-2013
ORDER GRANTING WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52 AS TO PLAINTIFF OSHANA, EDWARD K.

MASTER MOTION CALENDAR ON JUL-10-2013 IN 206, HEARING ON APPLICANT/PLAINTIFF EDWARD OSHANA'S WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS. NO APPEARANCE BY APPLICANT. THE COURT BEING UNABLE TO EXAMINE APPLICANT RULED ON THE APPLICATION SUBMITTED. THE COURT GRANTED THE APPLICATION IN WHOLE. ORDER SIGNED, AND ENDORSED-FILED COPY MAILED TO APPLICANT. JUDGE: CYNTHIA M. LEE; CLERK: R. VELUZ; MATTER NOT REPORTED. (206)
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE

HEARING ORDERED FOR APPLICATION OF WAIVER OF COURT FEES, PROOF OF SERVICE FILED BY PLAINTIFF OSHANA, EDWARD K. HEARING SET FOR JUL-10-2013 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 206
